'''鈭歾-l-sh-dh''' ('''kazalshedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vociferate|vociferate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vociferate|vociferate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-l-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kazalshedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizalshedhoko|thizalshedhoko]] || [[word:jizalshedhoko|jizalshedhoko]] || [[word:shizalshedhoko|shizalshedhoko]] || [[word:kizalshedhoko|kizalshedhoko]]
